name: chess-mcp
description: Grounded chess analysis — local Stockfish over a Node MCP server (no Docker). Skills: game review, repertoire builder, position analysis, annotated PGN.

args: MROOT=$(dirname "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT")/../../../marketplaces/chess-mcp; REPDIR="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/repertoires"; mkdir -p "$REPDIR"; exec env REPERTOIRE_DIR="$REPDIR" "$MROOT/node_modules/.bin/tsx" "$MROOT/apps/mcp-server/src/index.ts"
